meta.title: Online MBA in Artificial Intelligence with Job Assistance
meta.description: Master artificial intelligence applications, machine learning systems, data-driven business strategy, automation tools, and predictive analytics.

mainEntity.name: What is an MBA in Artificial Intelligence?

acceptedAnswer.text: An MBA in AI is a specialized postgraduate program that blends business administration with advanced technologies like AI, machine learning, and data analytics. It trains students to manage AI projects, drive digital transformation, and make data-driven business decisions.

mainEntity.name: Who should pursue an MBA in Artificial Intelligence?

acceptedAnswer.text: This program is best for fresh graduates, working professionals, managers, engineers, analysts, and non-tech learners who want to build careers in AI-powered business roles, digital transformation, and technology-driven management positions.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a technical background for an MBA in Artificial Intelligence?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, you don’t need a technical background. Our program begins with beginner-friendly foundation modules, making it easy for students from both technical and non-technical backgrounds to understand AI concepts before moving into advanced topics.

mainEntity.name: Is an MBA in AI suitable for working professionals?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Our program is designed to support working professionals through flexible learning options such as weekend, online, and self-paced formats, allowing you to upskill without disrupting your career.

mainEntity.name: What subjects are included in the MBA in AI syllabus?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our program covers a comprehensive mix of technical and management subjects, including AI & ML fundamentals, deep learning, Python programming, business intelligence, data analytics, cloud computing, automation tools, and AI-driven business strategy.

mainEntity.name: What practical skills will I learn in an MBA in Artificial Intelligence?

acceptedAnswer.text: In our program, you gain hands-on experience with Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, SQL, data visualization tools like Power BI and Tableau, cloud platforms, real-world datasets, live industry projects, and capstone assignments that build practical AI problem-solving skills.

mainEntity.name: What job roles can I get after completing an MBA in AI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our program prepares you for high-demand roles such as AI Product Manager, Business Analyst, Data Strategy Manager, AI Consultant, ML Ops Lead, Automation Manager, Analytics Manager, and other leadership positions in AI-driven companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the expected salary after completing an MBA in AI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates from our program typically earn between ₹6–10 LPA at the entry level, while professionals with experience can reach ₹15–30+ LPA, depending on industry, role, and skill expertise.

mainEntity.name: What industries hire MBA in AI graduates?

acceptedAnswer.text: Graduates from our program are hired across multiple sectors, including IT, fintech, e-commerce, healthcare, banking, manufacturing, consulting, retail, and fast-growing tech startups.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration of an MBA in AI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our MBA in Artificial Intelligence is a 2-year program, divided into 4 semesters. Each semester focuses on a blend of AI technologies, management concepts, and hands-on project work.

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build a Future in AI Leadership, Intelligent Automation
overViewOfOnline.description: The MBA in Artificial Intelligence at Teksversity builds expertise in machine learning systems, automation frameworks, AI-powered business analysis, intelligent product development, and data-driven decision-making. The program prepares professionals to create AI-driven solutions, streamline processes, and lead digital transformation across industries. With hands-on exposure through case studies, simulations, and AI product labs, learners gain practical skills suited for global business environments. This flexible online MBA supports working professionals aiming to advance intostrategic, analytical, and technology-focused leadership roles. It also enhances readiness for emerging AI-driven opportunities.
keyPoints: Learn core AI, ML, automation, and analytics principles
Gain practical experience through simulations and AI product labs
Build strategic, analytical, and technology-driven leadership skills
Prepare for advanced roles in AI strategy and digital transformation

heading: Why Choose MBA in Artificial Intelligence
in Teksversity?
whyOnline.initialDescription: Teksversity offers a structured MBA that blends foundational AI knowledge with modern automation, business analytics, and digital decision systems. The curriculum emphasizes practical learning, strategic thinking, and intelligent business operations. Every module integrates relevant industry insights to ensure learners develop strong, future-ready AI competencies

description.firstDescription: Students gain exposure to AI simulations, ML development tasks, automation workflows, and advanced analytics labs. Each activity is guided by experienced mentors, ensuring learners build real-world confidence in designing, deploying, and evaluating intelligent systems. The program supports continuous improvement through assessments, interactive learning, and personalized academic guidance.

description.secondDescription: Career readiness is a core strength of the Teksversity ecosystem. Learners benefit from expert mentorship, real-time project exposure, and industry-oriented training modules that bridge academic learning with employment requirements. This MBA is structured to help students excel in AI strategy, intelligent product development, and technology-driven business leadership.

keyPoints: Case studies in AI, ML, automation
Workshops on AI and ML tools

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
